chinese_news.title: 机器人启蒙，需要一所能“犯错”的幼儿园
chinese_news.summary:
2024年，强化学习奠基人理查德·萨顿与他的导师安德鲁·巴托共同获得了图灵奖。

这个奖项来得不算早。过去三十年，萨顿的理论支撑了AlphaGo、ChatGPT等系统的进化，但他三十年前写下的理论，直到今天才被具身智能行业真正理解：

智能体要从试错中学习，要从真实经验里进化。

2023年，萨顿参与创办非营利研究机构Openmind。2025年4月，萨顿在联合发表的文章《欢迎来到经验时代（Welcome to the Era of Experience）》中，再次一针见血地指出：

“新一代智能体，必须拥有像人类一样在长时间尺度上不断推进的经验流，在真实的物理反馈中实现自我进化。”

这一次，除了理论之外，萨顿把目光投向了更远的地方。

今年5月，萨顿与他山科技在加拿大正式签约，以长期合作的形式共同推进一个名为“机器人幼儿园”的项目。

chinese_news.title: 半价享顶级性能！天工 SkyClaw Agent 模型限时免费试用
chinese_news.summary:
5月26日，昆仑万维旗下天工 AI 正式推出高性能 Agent 模型 SkyClaw-v1.0，并同步发布轻量化版本 SkyClaw-v1.0-lite，兼具顶尖性能与极致性价比。

SkyClaw-v1.0 支持百万token上下文，深度适配各类真实智能体工作场景，重点优化复杂工具调用、多轮任务执行、代码生成、文件编辑、交互式应用构建与研究型数据分析。模型经过大规模 mid-train、高质量合成任务 SFT 与端到端强化学习优化，可在 OpenClaw、Hermes、Nanobot 等主流 Agent 环境中运行，同时适配Claude Code、Codex 等代码 Agent 框架，通用性与兼容性拉满。

Agent 模型和 Agent framework 的组合，正在改变模型的使用方式。过去，模型主要回答问题；现在，模型被放进一个能读取仓库、调用工具、编辑文件、运行测试、观察反馈的执行环境里，开始承担完整工作流。SkyClaw-v1.0 针对的正是这个阶段：让模型在长上下文和工具环境中持续推进任务，而不是只生成一段答案。<

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 国家级产业基金出手，桥田智能获亿元融资
chinese_news.summary:
硬氪获悉，上海桥田智能设备有限公司（下称“桥田智能”）已完成A+轮亿元级融资，由国家工业母机产业投资基金独家投资。资金将用于高端产能扩建、核心技术研发迭代及全球化市场布局。

桥田智能成立于2016年，专注于汽车主机厂机器人末端及周边设备，产品矩阵涵盖快换盘、磁力换模系统、修磨机、工业连接器等。公司此前已获吉利厚同、哇牛资本、美的资本、浙创投等产业资本投资。

公司创始人兼董事长刘小平拥有20年行业经验，曾任日本沙迪克生产厂长、技术总监，2010年曾创立桥田精密为KUKA机器人提供OEM服务。

公司去年底正式成为北京奔驰国产化快换盘设备供应商，并已主动出海对接德国奔驰及欧洲头部车企。2026年一季度则实现30%-40%增长。

chinese_news.title: 对话云鲸CEO张峻彬：理解人性，告别天真
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 黄楠

编辑 | 袁斯来

36岁时，云鲸CEO张峻彬意识到，自己不能再只做一个温和的人。

他做过一些得罪人的决定，但更多时候，张峻彬不善于说重话，以至于有人私下说他有些优柔寡断。“公司内部都说，要是彬哥对你的评价是‘还行’，说明你这东西已经很烂了。”他自己开玩笑。

过去几年，这种性格底色没有暴露太大短板。因为张峻彬更多泡在产品里，离琐碎而复杂的事务保持着一定距离。他喜欢自己做的事，也的确得以找到一角纯粹之地沉浸其中。

但一个产品经理终究不是CEO。成功的一把手可以放权、但不能让公司离手，并会在关键时刻手起刀落。“我以前太喜欢做产品了，也太温和，只做自己喜欢的事，不是一个合格的CEO。”张峻彬说。

也是在他埋头做产品的几年，云鲸内部的问题开始累积。你如果身处云鲸内部，会看到部门内耗，对接人不断更换，老员工相继流失。这些事看似分散，却最终指向同一个原因：没有一个人能将公司从上到下拧成一根绳。

最终，病灶还是摆到张

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Brent crude oil close above $110/barrel on any single day in June 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Bloomberg Brent Crude price feed or U.S. EIA daily close data.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Iran geopolitical escalation is live and peace talks fragile; market is pricing in quick de-escalation, but supply-side shocks (Strait of Hormuz) could spike oil 10%+ in weeks.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Iran vows retaliation, U.S. conducts self-defense strikes, Netanyahu intensifies Hezbollah strikes—multi-front Middle East risk clustering.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will NVIDIA (NVDA) stock outperform S&P 500 by >15% on a total-return basis between May 5 and November 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance, Bloomberg, or SEC-filed returns; SPY total return vs. NVDA total return.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Memory shortage (Micron at $1T cap) is signaling chip scarcity; NVDA typically leads in AI supercycles, but market is pricing in slowdown post-ChatGPT hype. Earnings visibility through Q3 2026 is strong.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Micron hitting $1T market cap (AI memory demand confirmation), AI regulatory clarity (Clarity Act progress), RWA tokenization acceleration pulling institutional compute demand.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the U.S. Federal Reserve cut the federal funds rate by at least 50 basis points (0.50%) by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Federal Reserve official policy announcement; FOMC meeting minutes and Powell statements.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Unemployment fears, AI labor displacement (Pope & traders), Iran geopolitical tail risk, and potential debt ceiling crisis in 2026 could force Fed capitulation; market currently pricing in only 1-2 cuts.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Traders on Kalshi betting unemployment jumps before 2030; U.S. self-defense strikes in Iran; Micron's AI capex boom could signal demand peak and margin compression risk by H2 2026.

investment_theses.thesis: Long Semiconductor (MU, NVDA, SOXL) into summer 2026 as AI memory scarcity proves real, but de-risk ahead of Q3 earnings on margin compression fears.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Micron hits $1T market cap on 18% surge; global memory shortage from AI spiking demand.
CoinDesk: Bitmine largest ETH purchase this year—institutional compute capex still accelerating.
36Kr: China's humanoid robot market share >80% globally; domestic AI/robotics capex driving memory demand.
investment_theses.counter_view: AI cycle already priced in; Q3 2026 earnings will reveal demand slowdown post-ChatGPT hype and margin compression as supply catches up; geopolitical volatility (Iran) creates downside tail risk.
investment_theses.expression: Long SOXL ETF or NVDA calls (1-3 month expiry), pair with short SOXL via June 2026 put spreads to cap downside on earnings miss.

investment_theses.thesis: Short USD/Long Commodities (oil, gold) if Iran peace talks collapse and Middle East escalates, or if Fed begins rate cuts due to labor displacement fears.
investment_theses.horizon: Days to weeks, with 2-3 month conviction window (May–August 2026)
supporting_signals: CNBC: U.S. self-defense strikes in Iran; Iran vows retaliation; Brent crude above $100.
CNBC: Traders on Kalshi betting unemployment jumps; Pope warns AI upending labor market; Fed rate-cut expectations rising.
BBC: Israel intensifies Hezbollah strikes; Netanyahu says Israel will crush Hezbollah—multi-front Middle East risk.
investment_theses.counter_view: Trump's peace deal rhetoric could hold; Iran de-escalates to save face; Fed remains hawkish on inflation despite labor market fears; USD remains bid on capital flight into safe haven.
investment_theses.expression: DXY short (or buy USD/DXY puts 3-6 month), long crude oil (USO ETF or CL futures), long gold (GLD ETF), long EM currencies (EEM or BRL/USD).

investment_theses.thesis: Long RWA tokenization and on-chain yield (stETH, rETH, USDC staking) as $51B market validates institutional adoption; assume further growth into 2027 on Clarity Act tailwinds.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: RWA market hits $51B as tokenized private credits surge; Grvt adds 3 tokenized yield funds; Bernstein confirms growth.
36Kr: Chinese AI/robotics capex pulling institutional on-chain users; humanoid robot capex could drive DeFi yield demand.
CoinDesk: Clarity Act won't lead to adoption without crypto tax reform—but regulatory clarity is still a tailwind for institutional capital.
investment_theses.counter_view: RWA growth is concentrated in illiquid private credit; defi yield rates compress as capital floods in; regulatory crackdown in EU (Spain blocks Polymarket/Kalshi) signals tighter enforcement ahead; macro recession in 2026 could reduce yield-seeking demand.
investment_theses.expression: Long stETH, rETH, or a tokenized RWA fund (if accessible); long AAVE or UNI tokens as protocol governance plays; long ETH/BTC ratio to capture DeFi adoption premium.

investment_theses.thesis: Long China humanoid robotics (if available via ADRs or crypto-native exposure) and SkyClaw/Agent AI models; 36Kr reports >80% global market share and state funding accelerating.
supporting_signals: 36Kr: China's humanoid robot market share >80% globally; government industrial mother-machine fund backing domestic robotics (桥田智能 Series A+).
36Kr: Kuaishou SkyClaw Agent model (v1.0) with 1M token context, optimized for tool-calling and task execution; Doubao (ByteDance) stock purchase window for employees.
36Kr: AI guardrail removals and open-source model regulation debate—Chinese models gaining adoption as Western models face regulatory headwinds.
investment_theses.counter_view: Geopolitical risk: U.S.–China tech decoupling could halt Chinese robot exports; domestic adoption already saturated; Agent model performance doesn't match OpenAI/Anthropic; SkyClaw adoption slow vs. ChatGPT.
investment_theses.expression: If U.S.-listed ADRs available: robotics ETFs (ROBO, DRIV); if crypto: long NEAR Protocol (agent infra play) or Solana (ecosystem hosting Chinese-friendly AI dApps).

investment_theses.thesis: Short risk assets into late May 2026 on Iran escalation tail risk; cover shorts if Trump announces binding peace deal; rotate into defensive sectors (utilities, staples) if geopolitical fears persist.
investment_theses.horizon: Days to weeks initially (May 5–31), extend to 2-3 months if escalation persists
supporting_signals: CNBC: U.S. conducts self-defense strikes in Iran; Iran condemns as 'gross violation' of ceasefire; vows retaliation.
BBC: Israel intensifies Hezbollah strikes; Netanyahu vows to crush Hezbollah; Russia threatens more Kyiv strikes.
CoinDesk: Bitcoin on sidelines as markets surge on Iran peace hopes—crypto volatility signal; geopolitical premia building.
CNBC: Brent crude jumps to >$100 on Iran retaliation threats; Trump pushes peace, but escalation risk live.
investment_theses.counter_view: Trump has track record of de-escalating via deal-making; Iran rationally avoids full war; U.S. military dominance is overwhelming; peace talks in Doha are progressing; markets overstating tail risk.
investment_theses.expression: Short SPY or QQQ (3-6 week puts, 2% OTM), long VIX calls (May–June expiry), long crude (USO), long gold (GLD); cover if Trump announces deal framework; rotate to XLU (utilities ETF) or defensive crypto (BTC over altcoins) if escalation persists.

flags: FLAG: 36Kr reports China humanoid robot >80% global market share with state-backed funding (桥田智能 A+ round via national industrial fund). English media has not highlighted China's robotics dominance this explicitly.

FLAG: 36Kr reports ByteDance 'Doubao' stock purchase window for Seed employees (May 2026), signaling internal expansion and potential valuation refresh. English media coverage of ByteDance internal equity movements is sparse.
FLAG: Hacker News (Spain blocks prediction markets Polymarket, Kalshi for lack of gambling license) signals regulatory risk to major prediction market operators; not yet major English news.

FLAG: 36Kr on SkyClaw Agent model (1M token context, multi-tool calling) as open-source alternative to frontier labs—emerging competitive signal in AI model market, underreported in English crypto/AI media.
